steps.title: Find circle A's intercept
steps.content: Circle A has equation $$(x+8)^2+(y-8)^2=64.$$ Its center is $(-8,8)$ and its radius is $8$. Since the center is $8$ units above the $x$-axis, the circle touches the $x$-axis at $(-8,0)$. Thus $(r,s)=(-8,0)$.

steps.title: Write circle B
steps.content: Circle B has the same radius as circle A, so its radius is also $8$. Its center is $(r,s)=(-8,0)$. A circle with center $(h,k)$ and radius $r$ has equation $$(x-h)^2+(y-k)^2=r^2.$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Substitute center $(-8,0)$ and radius $8$: $$(x+8)^2+y^2=64.$$ That confirms C.
